replications.outcome_quote:
We successfully replicated Nuttin's (1987) name-
letter effect with participants rating a higher liking for letters of the alphabet included in their first names (vs.

letters not included) (Study 1: d = 1.08 to 1.42). || We successfully replicated Nuttin's (1987) name-letter effect

replications.outcome_quote:
Only the effect of
consumption resources was significant, F(2, 598) = 4.28, p = .014, ηp2 = .014, η2 = .014;
its interaction with fairness was NS, F(2, 598) = 1.05, p = .351, ηp2 = .003, η2 = .003; the effect of fairness was NS, F(1, 598) = 1.01, p = .315, ηp2 = .002, η2 = .002. The two-
way interaction remained NS when each background measure (e.g., familiarity with the
brands) was included as a control variable. || [Figure 1]
